query:
INSERT INTO instance_files (
			id,
			instance_id,
			relative_path,
			file_name,
			enabled,
			sha1,
			size,
			missing,
			added_at,
			modified_at
		)
		VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		ON CONFLICT (instance_id, relative_path) DO UPDATE SET
			file_name = excluded.file_name,
			enabled = excluded.enabled,
			sha1 = excluded.sha1,
			size = excluded.size,
			missing = excluded.missing,
			modified_at = excluded.modified_at
